response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine staff-level experience and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which maps well to the AI-native engineering environment described. His distributed-systems depth at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second, low-latency async I/O) satisfies a core technical requirement. However, Python is entirely absent from both the skills section and every role's stack, which is a material gap against a stated must-have. TypeScript fluency is strong, agile and TDD practices are demonstrated, but explicit evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management at staff scale and operational on-call ownership is thin. The overall profile warrants a conversation to probe the Python gap and operational experience before committing.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq involves hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, giving direct exposure to agentic engineering workflows that the role treats as baseline

Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, processing millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O and caching — a strong match for the architecture requirements

Progressive staff-level titles and founding experience across multiple companies show technical leadership, independent ownership, and systems breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
concerns: Python is completely absent from the resume — not in the skills section, not in any role description — making it unclear how the candidate meets the 'strong Python' must-have requirement

Cross-functional stakeholder management and bridging engineering/product/leadership is not evidenced in any role; the resume reads as individual-contributor and open-source oriented with little signal on organizational coordination at scale

Operational ownership and on-call readiness are not mentioned anywhere; the high-throughput Sociomantic experience covers the architecture side but leaves incident response and production ownership undemonstrated
